segments.text_ko: 대장간 내부. 붉은 화덕의 불빛이 좁은 공간을 가득 채운다. 카엘이 망치를 내려치며 검을 벼리고 있다.
segments.text_en: Inside the forge. The red glow of the furnace fills the narrow space. Kael hammers away, sharpening a blade.

segments.text_ko: 문이 열리고 톰이 맥주 두 잔을 들고 들어온다.
segments.text_en: The door opens and Tom enters carrying two mugs of beer.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: 또 야근이야? 칼이 닳겠다, 닳아.
segments.text_en: Working overtime again? You'll wear out the blade.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 라센 영감이 내일까지 달라잖아. 밭 매는 낫인데 왜 이렇게 무딘 건지.
segments.text_en: Old Rasen wants it by tomorrow. It's a sickle for the fields, yet it's so dull.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: 라센 영감 낫은 원래 돌로 만든 거 아냐? 열 번째 갈아주는 거잖아.
segments.text_en: Isn't Rasen's sickle made of stone? This is the tenth time you've sharpened it.

segments.text_ko: 카엘이 피식 웃는다. 맥주를 한 모금 마신다.
segments.text_en: Kael chuckles. He takes a sip of beer.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: ...기사 그만둔 거 후회 안 해?
segments.text_en: ...Don't you regret quitting the knights?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: ...후회할 게 뭐가 있어. 여기서 네 옆에서 대장간 때리는 게 훨씬 낫지.
segments.text_en: ...What's there to regret? Hammering at the forge beside you is much better.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: 그래, 네 솜씨가 아까운 건 사실이야. 왕국 최고의 검 수리공이라니까.
segments.text_en: Well, your skills are wasted here. The kingdom's finest blade repairman.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 검 수리공이 아니라 대장장이라고 했지.
segments.text_en: I said I'm a blacksmith, not a blade repairman.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: 수리만 하잖아.
segments.text_en: But all you do is repairs.

segments.text_ko: 두 사람이 웃는다. 카엘이 맥주를 부딪친다.
segments.text_en: The two laugh. Kael clinks his mug.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: ...왕도에 있을 때, 매일 생각했어. 이 마을 냄새. 풀 냄새랑 라센 영감 소 냄새 섞인 거.
segments.text_en: ...When I was in the capital, I thought of it every day. The smell of this village. Grass and old Rasen's cattle mixed together.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: 그건 좀 별로다.
segments.text_en: That's not exactly pleasant.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 별로여도 집이니까.
segments.text_en: Even if it's not pleasant, it's home.

segments.text_ko: 잠시 침묵. 멀리서 아이들이 뛰노는 소리가 들린다.
segments.text_en: A brief silence. The sound of children playing echoes in the distance.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: ...근데 진짜 괜찮은 거야? 넌 기사로서 재능이 있었잖아. 왕도에서 출세하고, 장군까지 될 수 있었는데—
segments.text_en: ...But are you really okay? You had talent as a knight. You could have risen in the capital, even become a general—

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 지키고 싶은 게 왕국이 아니었어.
segments.text_en: What I wanted to protect wasn't the kingdom.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: 그럼?
segments.text_en: Then what?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: ...People.

segments.text_ko: 카엘이 대장간 문을 열고 나온다. 저녁 하늘 아래 이르헨 마을이 펼쳐진다. 결계석이 은은하게 빛나고 있다.
segments.text_en: Kael opens the forge door and steps out. The village of Irhen spreads beneath the evening sky. The barrier stone glows softly.

segments.text_ko: 마을 광장. 카엘과 톰이 걸어간다. 올가 촌장이 결계석 앞에서 하늘을 올려다보고 있다.
segments.text_en: The village square. Kael and Tom walk together. Village chief Olga gazes at the sky before the barrier stone.

segments.speaker: olga
segments.text_ko: 요즘 빛이 좀 약해진 것 같은데...
segments.text_en: The light seems a bit weaker lately...

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 촌장님, 무슨 일이세요?
segments.text_en: Chief, is something wrong?

segments.speaker: olga
segments.text_ko: 아, 카엘이구나. 아니, 별것 아니야. 이 늙은이 눈이 침침해졌나 보다.
segments.text_en: Ah, Kael. No, it's nothing. These old eyes must be getting dim.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: ...별일 아닐 거예요.
segments.text_en: ...It's probably nothing.

segments.speaker: olga
segments.text_ko: 그렇겠지. 200년간 한 번도 꺼진 적 없으니까. 네 어머니한테 저녁 갖다드려라.
segments.text_en: I suppose so. It hasn't gone out in 200 years. Go take dinner to your mother.

segments.text_ko: 카엘의 집. 소박한 시골 가옥. 카엘의 노모가 부엌에서 국을 끓이고 있다.
segments.text_en: Kael's home. A humble country house. His elderly mother is making soup in the kitchen.

segments.speaker: mother
segments.text_ko: 왔니? 손 씻어라, 국 다 됐다.
segments.text_en: You're back? Wash your hands, the soup is ready.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 네.
segments.text_en: Yes.

segments.speaker: mother
segments.text_ko: 톰이랑 또 술 마셨지?
segments.text_en: You were drinking with Tom again, weren't you?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 한 잔만요.
segments.text_en: Just one glass.

segments.speaker: mother
segments.text_ko: 네 아버지도 그렇게 말했다. ...여기 돌아와줘서 고맙다, 얘야.
segments.text_en: Your father used to say the same. ...Thank you for coming back, child.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 미안해할 것 없어요. 제가 좋아서 온 건데. ...그리고 여기가 저한테는 왕도보다 중요해요.
segments.text_en: There's nothing to feel sorry about. I came because I wanted to. ...And this place means more to me than the capital.

segments.text_ko: 노모가 아무 말 없이 카엘의 머리를 쓸어준다. 창 밖으로 결계석의 빛이 희미하게 깜빡인다.
segments.text_en: His mother silently strokes Kael's hair. Outside the window, the barrier stone's light flickers faintly.

segments.text_ko: 다음 날 오전. 마을 입구에서 먼지가 일어난다. 군화 소리, 갑옷 소리. 왕국 징발대가 도착한다.
segments.text_en: The next morning. Dust rises at the village entrance. The sound of boots and armor. The kingdom's requisition corps arrives.

segments.speaker: deputy
segments.text_ko: 왕명이다! 에른하르트 왕조 칼드릭 3세 폐하의 명에 의거, 이르헨 마을의 결계석을 왕도 아스칼론으로 이송한다!
segments.text_en: By royal decree! By order of His Majesty Caldric III of the Ernhardt Dynasty, the barrier stone of Irhen village is to be transferred to the capital Ascalon!

segments.speaker: olga
segments.text_ko: 잠깐, 잠깐만. 결계석을 가져간다니 무슨 소리야? 결계석은 이 마을의 수호석이야. 200년간—
segments.text_en: Wait, wait. What do you mean taking the barrier stone? It's this village's guardian stone. For 200 years—

segments.speaker: deputy
segments.text_ko: 촌장, 이것은 토론이 아닙니다. 왕명입니다.
segments.text_en: Chief, this is not a debate. It is a royal decree.

segments.speaker: olga
segments.text_ko: 왕명이면 다야? 결계석이 없으면 이 마을은—
segments.text_en: So a royal decree means everything? Without the barrier stone, this village—

segments.speaker: deputy
segments.text_ko: 변방의 안전보다 왕도의 안전이 우선입니다.
segments.text_en: The capital's safety takes priority over the frontier's.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: 카엘, 저거 뭐야? 결계석을 가져간다고?
segments.text_en: Kael, what is this? They're taking the barrier stone?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 기다려 주십시오.
segments.text_en: Please wait.

segments.speaker: deputy
segments.text_ko: ...뭐야, 너는.
segments.text_en: ...Who are you?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 카엘. 전직 왕국 기사단 소속입니다. 결계석을 회수하면 이 마을의 결계가 무너집니다.
segments.text_en: Kael. Former member of the Royal Knights. If you take the barrier stone, this village's barrier will collapse.

segments.speaker: deputy
segments.text_ko: 변방에 재의 짐승이 나온다는 보고는 없다. 결계석은 예방 차원의 설비에 불과해.
segments.text_en: There are no reports of Ash Beasts in the frontier. The barrier stone is merely a precautionary measure.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 예방 차원이 아닙니다. 결계석이 없으면 이 마을은 무방비 상태로—
segments.text_en: It is not merely precautionary. Without the barrier stone, this village will be defenseless—

segments.speaker: deputy
segments.text_ko: 더 이상 방해하면 반역으로 간주한다, '전직 기사'.
segments.text_en: Any further interference will be considered treason, 'former knight'.

segments.speaker: mother
segments.text_ko: 싸우지 마라. 제발.
segments.text_en: Don't fight. Please.

segments.text_ko: 카엘이 이를 악물고 물러선다. 병사들이 결계석을 분리한다. 마을을 감싸고 있던 은은한 빛이 소멸한다.
segments.text_en: Kael grits his teeth and steps back. The soldiers detach the barrier stone. The soft light that enveloped the village vanishes.

segments.speaker: olga
segments.text_ko: ...200년이야. 200년간 이 마을을 지켜온 빛인데.
segments.text_en: ...200 years. The light that protected this village for 200 years.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: ...어쩔 수 없었어.
segments.text_en: ...There was nothing we could do.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 기사였으면 뭔가 할 수 있었을까. 아니, 기사였어도 못 막았겠지. 왕명이니까.
segments.text_en: Could I have done something if I were still a knight? No, even as a knight I couldn't have stopped it. It's a royal decree.

segments.text_ko: 한밤중. 카엘이 대장간에서 잠을 못 이루고 있다. 갑자기 — 굉음. 하늘이 갈라지는 소리.
segments.text_en: Midnight. Kael lies awake in the forge. Suddenly — a thunderous crash. The sound of the sky tearing apart.

segments.text_ko: 하늘에 잿빛 균열이 생겨 있다. 균열 사이로 검은 것들이 쏟아져 내린다 — 재의 짐승들.
segments.text_en: An ashen rift appears in the sky. Dark things pour through the cracks — Ash Beasts.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: ...The barrier—!

segments.text_ko: 마을 곳곳에서 비명이 터진다. 카엘이 벽에 걸린 녹슨 롱소드를 잡는다.
segments.text_en: Screams erupt throughout the village. Kael grabs the rusty longsword hanging on the wall.

segments.text_ko: 전투 후. 하늘의 균열에서 더 많은 것들이 쏟아진다. 끝이 없다.
segments.text_en: After the battle. More creatures pour from the rift. There is no end.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 이건... 혼자서는...
segments.text_en: This is... alone I can't...

segments.speaker: olga
segments.text_ko: 카엘! 동쪽 길이 아직 안 뚫렸다! 사람들을 데리고 나가야 해!
segments.text_en: Kael! The eastern road is still clear! You need to lead people out!

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 촌장님, 어머니는—
segments.text_en: Chief, my mother—

segments.speaker: olga
segments.text_ko: 톰이 모시고 갔다! 네 어머니 집 쪽으로!
segments.text_en: Tom went with her! Toward your mother's house!

segments.text_ko: 카엘이 집 앞에 도착한다. 집이 반쯤 무너져 있다. 톰이 노모를 업고 비틀거리며 나오고 있다. 등에 깊은 상처.
segments.text_en: Kael arrives at his house. It is half-collapsed. Tom is staggering out, carrying Kael's mother on his back. A deep wound across his back.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: 왔구나... 어머님은 괜찮아...
segments.text_en: You're here... your mother is fine...

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 일어나, 톰. 같이 가자. 동쪽 길로—
segments.text_en: Get up, Tom. Let's go together. Through the eastern road—

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: 다리가... 안 움직여. 가. 사람들 데리고 가.
segments.text_en: My legs... won't move. Go. Take the people and go.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 뭔 소리야! 업고 갈 수 있어—
segments.text_en: What are you saying! I can carry you—

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: 안 돼. 나까지 데리고 가면 다 죽어.
segments.text_en: No. If you take me too, everyone dies.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: 후회... 없다.
segments.text_en: No... regrets.

segments.speaker: tom
segments.text_ko: 네 옆에서...
segments.text_en: By your side...

segments.text_ko: 톰의 눈이 감긴다. 카엘이 얼어붙는다. 노모가 카엘의 어깨를 흔든다.
segments.text_en: Tom's eyes close. Kael freezes. His mother shakes his shoulders.

segments.speaker: mother
segments.text_ko: 카엘... 카엘! 가야 해!
segments.text_en: Kael... Kael! We have to go!

segments.text_ko: 카엘이 이를 악물고 노모를 업는다. 돌아선다. 걷는다.
segments.text_en: Kael grits his teeth and lifts his mother onto his back. He turns around. He walks.

segments.speaker: olga
segments.text_ko: ...그 아이가.
segments.text_en: ...That boy.

segments.speaker: olga
segments.text_ko: 울 시간은 나중에 있다. 지금은 산 사람들을 지켜야 해.
segments.text_en: There will be time to cry later. Now we must protect the living.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: ...미안해, 톰.
segments.text_en: ...I'm sorry, Tom.

segments.text_ko: 올가가 피난민들을 이끌고 떠난다. 카엘이 후위를 맡아 마지막으로 걷는다. 등 뒤로 고향이 사라진다.
segments.text_en: Olga leads the refugees away. Kael takes the rear, walking last. Behind him, his hometown vanishes.

segments.text_ko: 며칠 후. 황폐한 가도. 카엘이 홀로 걷고 있다. 길가에 무너진 마차 옆에 여자가 쓰러져 있다.
segments.text_en: Days later. A desolate road. Kael walks alone. A woman lies collapsed beside an overturned carriage.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 살아 있어요?
segments.text_en: Are you alive?

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_en: ...Water.

segments.text_ko: 카엘이 수통을 건넨다. 세리아가 물을 마시고 일어난다.
segments.text_en: Kael hands over his canteen. Seria drinks and sits up.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 고맙습니다. ...기사?
segments.text_en: Thank you. ...A knight?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 전직.
segments.text_en: Former.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 저도 전직이에요. 사제였죠. 이단이라서요. '시원화가 약해지고 있다'고 말했더니 쫓겨났어요.
segments.text_en: I'm former as well. I was a priestess. Branded heretic. I was cast out for saying 'the Siwon Fire is weakening'.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 어디서 온 거예요?
segments.text_en: Where are you from?

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 아스칼론. 시원화 신전에서.
segments.text_en: Ascalon. The Siwon Fire Temple.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 이르헨만이 아닙니다. 변방 마을 최소 네 곳에서 동시에 결계석 회수가 진행됐어요.
segments.text_en: Irhen is not the only one. At least four frontier villages had their barrier stones taken simultaneously.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 네 곳이나?
segments.text_en: Four places?

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 아마 더 있을 거예요. 함께 가실 생각 있어요? '전직 기사'님?
segments.text_en: Probably more. Would you like to come along, 'former knight'?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 기사였어도 막을 수 없었을까요. 이르헨을.
segments.text_en: Could I have stopped it even as a knight? Irhen.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 기사였어도 막을 수 없었을 거예요. 이건 한 사람이 막을 수 있는 문제가 아닙니다.
segments.text_en: Even as a knight, you couldn't have stopped it. This isn't something one person can prevent.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 그러면 어떻게?
segments.text_en: Then how?

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 알아내야죠. 왜 이런 일이 벌어지고 있는지.
segments.text_en: We need to find out. Why this is happening.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: ...저는 카엘입니다.
segments.text_en: ...I'm Kael.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 세리아예요.
segments.text_en: I'm Seria.

segments.text_ko: 가도 뒤쪽에서 재의 짐승 무리가 나타난다.
segments.text_en: Ash Beasts appear behind them on the road.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: ...빠르네요. 벌써 여기까지.
segments.text_en: ...They're fast. Already this far.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 싸울 수 있어요?
segments.text_en: Can you fight?

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 이단 사제라도 빛의 마법 정도는 쓸 수 있어요. 치유도 되니까, 무리하셔도 돼요.
segments.text_en: Even a heretic priestess can use light magic. I can heal too, so don't hold back.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 검술은 녹슬지 않았네요.
segments.text_en: Your swordsmanship hasn't rusted.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 매일 망치질하면 팔힘은 안 줄어요.
segments.text_en: Daily hammering keeps the arm strength up.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 벨마르까지 가면 배를 타고 왕도로 갈 수 있을 거예요.
segments.text_en: If we reach Belmar, we can take a ship to the capital.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 기사가 아니라서 톰을 못 살렸어요.
segments.text_en: Because I wasn't a knight, I couldn't save Tom.

segments.text_ko: 세리아가 아무 말 없이 카엘 옆을 걷는다. 위로의 말을 하지 않는다. 대신 묵묵히 함께 걷는다.
segments.text_en: Seria walks silently beside Kael. She doesn't offer words of comfort. Instead, she simply walks alongside him.

segments.text_ko: 3일 후. 벨마르 항구. 활기차지만 어딘가 불안한 기운. 변방에서 밀려온 피난민들이 많다.
segments.text_en: Three days later. Belmar Harbor. Lively but tinged with unease. Many refugees from the frontier.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 사람이 많네요.
segments.text_en: Lots of people.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 이르헨만 그런 게 아니라는 뜻이에요.
segments.text_en: It means Irhen wasn't the only one.

segments.text_ko: 부두 근처 주점. 벨마르 상인 길드장 바르톨이 모노클을 끼고 장부를 보고 있다.
segments.text_en: A tavern near the docks. Bartol, the merchant guild master, reads his ledger through a monocle.

segments.speaker: bartol
segments.text_ko: 이르헨에서 왔다? 멀리도 왔군. 왕도로 가는 배편을 알아보고 있다고?
segments.text_en: From Irhen? You've come far. Looking for passage to the capital?

segments.speaker: bartol
segments.text_ko: 왕도? 지금? 시기가 좋지 않아. 왕도에서 '모든 것이 정상이다'라는 말만 반복하고 있거든.
segments.text_en: The capital? Now? The timing is bad. The capital keeps repeating that 'everything is normal'.

segments.speaker: bartol
segments.text_ko: 왕도까지 안전하게 가려면 험한 놈이 하나 필요할 거야. 밀수 루트를 아는 놈인데.
segments.text_en: If you want to get to the capital safely, you'll need a rough fellow. One who knows the smuggling routes.

segments.text_ko: 주점 구석에 낡은 가죽 코트를 걸친 남자가 혼자 술을 마시고 있다. 금니가 번쩍인다. 그리드.
segments.text_en: In the corner of the tavern, a man in a worn leather coat drinks alone. His gold tooth gleams. Grid.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: ...손님은 돈을 내는 놈을 말하는 거지.
segments.text_en: ...A customer is someone who pays.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 기사랑 사제? 무슨 조합이야, 순례인가.
segments.text_en: A knight and a priestess? What kind of combo is this, a pilgrimage?

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 밀수 루트로 가면 징발대를 피할 수 있어. 대신 조건이 있지.
segments.text_en: The smuggling route avoids the requisition corps. But I have conditions.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 밀수품이요?
segments.text_en: Contraband?

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 약이야, 약. 변방 마을에서 구하기 힘든 약. 뭐, 일부는 술이기도 하고.
segments.text_en: Medicine. Medicine. Hard to get in frontier villages. Well, some of it is liquor too.

segments.text_ko: 카엘이 그리드의 가슴 주머니에서 삐져나온 종이를 본다 — 아이가 크레용으로 그린 그림. '아빠와 나'라고 쓰여 있다.
segments.text_en: Kael notices a paper poking out of Grid's breast pocket — a child's crayon drawing. 'Daddy and Me' written in crooked letters.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: ...딸이 있어요?
segments.text_en: ...You have a daughter?

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: ...상관없잖아.
segments.text_en: ...None of your business.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 좋아요. 같이 갑시다.
segments.text_en: All right. Let's go together.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 믿어도 되는 사람인가요?
segments.text_en: Can we trust this person?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 딸 그림을 갖고 다니는 밀수업자면... 나쁜 사람은 아닐 거예요.
segments.text_en: A smuggler who carries his daughter's drawing... can't be a bad person.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 출발은 내일 새벽. 내 배가 남쪽 부두 3번에 있어.
segments.text_en: We leave at dawn tomorrow. My boat is at South Dock 3.

segments.text_ko: 벨마르 뒷골목. 카엘이 숙소로 돌아가는 길. 뒤에서 재빠른 발소리 — 돈주머니가 사라진다.
segments.text_en: Back alley of Belmar. Kael heading back to the inn. Quick footsteps behind — his coin purse vanishes.

segments.text_ko: 막다른 골목. 후드 아래로 은줄기 섞인 검은 머리와 큰 눈이 보인다. 한쪽 손에 빛나는 화상 자국.
segments.text_en: Dead end alley. Under the hood, black hair streaked with silver and large eyes. A glowing burn mark on one hand.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 돈주머니. 돌려줘요.
segments.text_en: The coin purse. Give it back.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: ...미안해요.
segments.text_en: ...I'm sorry.

segments.text_ko: 순순히 돌려준다. 리넨이 주저앉는다. 며칠은 굶은 듯한 모습.
segments.text_en: She hands it back obediently. Linen collapses. She looks like she hasn't eaten in days.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: ...배고파요?
segments.text_en: ...Are you hungry?

segments.text_ko: 카엘이 빵 한 조각을 꺼내 건넨다. 리넨이 허겁지겁 먹는다.
segments.text_en: Kael pulls out a piece of bread and offers it. Linen devours it.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 이름이 뭐예요?
segments.text_en: What's your name?

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: ...모르겠어요. 아무것도 기억이 안 나요. 여기 어떻게 왔는지도.
segments.text_en: ...I don't know. I can't remember anything. Not even how I got here.

segments.text_ko: 이때 골목 저편에서 재의 짐승 한 마리가 나타난다. 그런데 — 재의 짐승이 리넨 앞에서 멈춘다. 마치 피하듯이 물러선다.
segments.text_en: An Ash Beast appears at the end of the alley. But — it stops before Linen. It retreats as if avoiding her.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_en: ...What?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 왜... 너한테는 안 덤벼들지?
segments.text_en: Why... doesn't it attack you?

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: ...모르겠어요. 원래 그래요.
segments.text_en: ...I don't know. It's always been like that.

segments.text_ko: 숙소에서. 세리아가 리넨의 이마에 손을 댄다. 빛이 잠깐 반짝인다.
segments.text_en: At the inn. Seria places her hand on Linen's forehead. A brief flash of light.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 이 사람... 시원화와 비슷한 기운이 느껴져요.
segments.text_en: This person... I sense an energy similar to the Siwon Fire.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 가끔 불꽃 같은 게 보여요. 꿈에서. 타는 것 같은데... 따뜻해요.
segments.text_en: Sometimes I see something like flames. In my dreams. It seems to burn... but it's warm.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 일단 같이 가죠. 혼자 두고 갈 수는 없으니까.
segments.text_en: Let's go together for now. We can't just leave you alone.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 같이... 가도 돼요?
segments.text_en: I can... go with you?

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: ...리넨. 그렇게 불러주세요. 왜인지 모르겠는데 이 이름이 맞는 것 같아요.
segments.text_en: ...Linen. Please call me that. I don't know why, but this name feels right.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 거지까지 데리고 다니게 생겼네.
segments.text_en: Now we're hauling beggars too.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: ...내 배 크기 알아?
segments.text_en: ...Do you know how small my boat is?

segments.text_ko: 새벽. 벨마르 남쪽 부두. 네 사람이 그리드의 배 앞에 모여 있다.
segments.text_en: Dawn. Belmar's south dock. Four people gather before Grid's boat.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 좋아, 항구를 빠져나가면 해안선 따라 동쪽으로—
segments.text_en: Alright, once we clear the harbor, we follow the coast east—

segments.text_ko: 갑자기 부두 입구에 횃불이 나타난다. 징발대 병사들.
segments.text_en: Suddenly, torches appear at the dock entrance. Requisition corps soldiers.

segments.speaker: deputy
segments.text_ko: 거기 서라! 탈영 기사 카엘을 체포한다!
segments.text_en: Halt! Deserter knight Kael is under arrest!

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 배로는 못 가겠어. 이쪽으로!
segments.text_en: We can't take the boat. This way!

segments.text_ko: 전투 중 — 리넨의 손에서 불꽃이 튀어나온다. 제어 불능.
segments.text_en: During battle — flames burst from Linen's hands. Uncontrolled.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: ...뭐야 이거!
segments.text_en: ...What is this!

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 질문은 나중에! 뛰어!
segments.text_en: Questions later! Run!

segments.text_ko: 벨마르 외곽, 동쪽 숲 입구. 징발대가 추격을 포기한다.
segments.text_en: Belmar outskirts, eastern forest entrance. The requisition corps gives up the chase.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 밀수 루트가 이렇게 쓰일 줄은 몰랐네.
segments.text_en: Never thought the smuggling route would be used like this.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 왜 기사를 그만뒀어요?
segments.text_en: Why did you quit the knights?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: ...지키고 싶은 것이 왕국이 아니라 사람이었으니까.
segments.text_en: ...Because what I wanted to protect wasn't the kingdom, but people.

segments.text_ko: 세리아가 조용히 웃는다. 처음으로 경계를 풀고 짓는 웃음.
segments.text_en: Seria smiles quietly. The first smile where she lets her guard down.

segments.speaker: seria
segments.text_ko: 좋은 이유네요.
segments.text_en: That's a good reason.

segments.text_ko: 리넨이 나무 아래에서 자기 손을 바라보고 있다.
segments.text_en: Linen sits under a tree, staring at her hands.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: ...나는 누구지.
segments.text_en: ...Who am I.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 모르면 찾아야지. 왕도 가면 뭐라도 알 수 있겠지.
segments.text_en: If you don't know, you have to find out. We might learn something at the capital.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: ...왜 나한테까지 친절한 거예요?
segments.text_en: ...Why are you kind even to me?

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 친절이 아니라 투자야. 불꽃 쏘는 놈이 아군이면 좋으니까. ...그리고 배고파 보이잖아.
segments.text_en: It's not kindness, it's an investment. Having someone who shoots fire on our side is useful. ...And you looked hungry.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 왕도까지 가려면 실바렌 숲을 통과해야 해요.
segments.text_en: To reach the capital, we need to pass through the Silvaren Forest.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: ...이상한 일행이네요. 전직 기사, 이단 사제, 밀수업자, 기억 잃은 떠돌이.
segments.text_en: ...What a strange company. A former knight, a heretic priestess, a smuggler, and an amnesiac drifter.

segments.speaker: grid
segments.text_ko: 영웅담에나 나올 법한 조합이지.
segments.text_en: The kind of group you'd find in a hero's tale.

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 맞아요. 그냥... 왜 이런 일이 벌어지고 있는지 알고 싶을 뿐이에요.
segments.text_en: Right. I just... want to know why this is happening.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 이르헨이... 어떤 곳이었어요?
segments.text_en: Irhen... what kind of place was it?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: 작은 마을이었어요. 결계석이 광장 한가운데 있었고, 아이들이 그 주변에서 뛰어놀았죠. 대장간이 있었고, 톰이 있었고... 좋은 곳이었어요.
segments.text_en: It was a small village. The barrier stone was in the center of the square, and children played around it. There was a forge, and Tom was there... It was a good place.

segments.speaker: linen
segments.text_ko: 다시 갈 수 있을까요?
segments.text_en: Can you go back someday?

segments.speaker: kael
segments.text_ko: ...만들 수는 있을 거예요. 다시.
segments.text_en: ...We can rebuild it. Again.

segments.text_ko: 일행이 실바렌 숲 깊이 들어간다. 어딘가에서 화살촉이 그들을 겨누고 있다 — 하지만 아직 아무도 모른다.
segments.text_en: The party enters deep into Silvaren Forest. Somewhere, an arrowhead is aimed at them — but no one knows yet.
